scenarios.title: Coffee with a friend
scenarios.description: Catch up with a friend over coffee. Order a drink and chat about how you're doing.
scenarios.starterLineSk: Čau! Tak čo, dáš si kávu?

turns.sk: Čau! Tak čo, dáš si kávu?
turns.enGloss: Hi! So, will you have a coffee?

turns.sk: Super. A ako sa máš? Dlho sme sa nevideli.
turns.enGloss: Great. And how are you? We haven't seen each other in a while.

replies.sk: Mám sa dobre, vďaka. A ty?

replies.enGloss: Not bad, quite a lot of work.

turns.sk: Ja tiež veľa makám. Čo je u teba nové?
turns.enGloss: I also work a lot. What's new with you?

replies.enGloss: I started going to the gym.

turns.sk: To je super! Ja by som tiež mal viac cvičiť.
turns.enGloss: That's great! I should exercise more too.

turns.sk: Dobrý nápad. Mimochodom, máš plány na víkend?
turns.enGloss: Good idea. By the way, do you have plans for the weekend?

replies.enGloss: I'm going to the cottage to my parents'.

turns.sk: Tak fajn. Už musím ísť, mám stretnutie. Maj sa!
turns.enGloss: Alright then. I have to go, I have a meeting. Take care!

scenarios.title: Texting plans
scenarios.description: Make plans to meet up over text. Pick a time and place.

turns.sk: Ahoj, čo robíš večer?
turns.enGloss: Hi, what are you doing tonight?

turns.sk: Nedáme si niekde pivo?
turns.enGloss: Shall we grab a beer somewhere?

turns.sk: Čo tak ten bar na námestí? O siedmej?
turns.enGloss: How about that bar on the square? At seven?

replies.enGloss: Deal, I'll be there at seven.

replies.sk: Môže byť skôr? Tak o šiestej?
replies.enGloss: Can it be earlier? Around six?

turns.sk: O šiestej mi to vyhovuje. Tak o šiestej.
turns.enGloss: Six works for me. So at six then.

replies.sk: Dobre, dám ti vedieť, ak budem meškať.
replies.enGloss: Okay, I'll let you know if I'm late.

turns.sk: Vezmi aj Petra, ak chce prísť.
turns.enGloss: Bring Peter too, if he wants to come.

turns.sk: Paráda. Tak sa vidíme večer!
turns.enGloss: Awesome. So see you tonight!

scenarios.title: Running late
scenarios.description: You're late to meet someone. Apologize and explain.
scenarios.starterLineSk: Si už na ceste? Čakám pred kinom.

turns.sk: Si už na ceste? Čakám pred kinom.
turns.enGloss: Are you on your way? I'm waiting in front of the cinema.

replies.enGloss: I'm in the cinema at home (nonsense).

turns.sk: Aha, a kedy tu zhruba budeš?
turns.enGloss: Oh, and roughly when will you be here?

replies.enGloss: I'll be there right away, really sorry.

turns.sk: Čo sa stalo? Zaspal si?
turns.enGloss: What happened? Did you oversleep?

turns.sk: Nevadí, počkám. Film aj tak začína o pol.
turns.enGloss: No worries, I'll wait. The film starts at half past anyway.

turns.sk: Daj vedieť, keď budeš blízko.
turns.enGloss: Let me know when you're close.

replies.enGloss: Okay, I'm turning the corner now.

turns.sk: Vidím ťa! Konečne. Poď, ideme dnu.
turns.enGloss: I see you! Finally. Come on, let's go in.

scenarios.title: Weekend recap
scenarios.description: Tell a friend how your weekend went and ask about theirs.

turns.sk: Ahoj, ako bolo cez víkend?
turns.enGloss: Hi, how was the weekend?

replies.enGloss: It was great, I had a rest.

turns.sk: Aj mne ušlo to dobre. Čo si robil?
turns.enGloss: Mine went well too. What did you do?

replies.sk: Boli sme s rodinou na výlete.
replies.enGloss: We went on a trip with the family.

replies.sk: Hlavne som spal a pozeral seriály.
replies.enGloss: Mostly I slept and watched shows.

turns.sk: Pekné! A kam ste šli na ten výlet?
turns.enGloss: Nice! And where did you go on that trip?

replies.enGloss: To the Tatras, it was beautiful there.

turns.sk: Tatry milujem. Aké bolo počasie?
turns.enGloss: I love the Tatras. What was the weather like?

replies.enGloss: It rained, so we didn't walk much.

turns.sk: Škoda toho dažďa. Aspoň ste si oddýchli, nie?
turns.enGloss: Shame about the rain. At least you rested, right?

replies.sk: Hej, to hej. Stálo to za to.
replies.enGloss: Yeah, that's true. It was worth it.

turns.sk: Tak nabudúce poďme spolu niekam.
turns.enGloss: So next time let's go somewhere together.

scenarios.title: At the pub
scenarios.description: Order drinks and food at a pub and chat with the waiter.

turns.sk: Dobrý deň, čo si dáte?
turns.enGloss: Hello, what would you like?

replies.sk: Dám si jedno veľké pivo, prosím.
replies.enGloss: I'll have one large beer, please.

turns.sk: Jasné. A dáte si aj niečo pod zub?
turns.enGloss: Sure. And will you have something to eat too?

replies.enGloss: Yes, do you have cheese sticks?

turns.sk: Výborná voľba. Niečo na pitie ešte?
turns.enGloss: Excellent choice. Anything else to drink?

replies.enGloss: No, that's enough for now, thanks.

turns.sk: Nech sa páči, vaše pivo. Dobrú chuť!
turns.enGloss: Here you go, your beer. Enjoy!

turns.sk: Chutilo vám? Môžem doniesť účet?
turns.enGloss: Did you enjoy it? Can I bring the bill?

turns.sk: Bude to dvanásť eur. Ďakujem a dovidenia!
turns.enGloss: That'll be twelve euros. Thank you and goodbye!

replies.sk: Nech sa páči, zvyšok je váš.
replies.enGloss: Here you go, keep the change.

scenarios.title: Asking a favor
scenarios.description: Ask a friend for a small favor and arrange the details.
scenarios.starterLineSk: Čau, môžem ťa o niečo poprosiť?

turns.sk: Čau, môžem ťa o niečo poprosiť?
turns.enGloss: Hi, can I ask you for something?

turns.sk: Mohol by si ma zajtra odviezť na stanicu?
turns.enGloss: Could you give me a ride to the station tomorrow?

turns.sk: Vlak mi ide o ôsmej, takže tak o pol ôsmej?
turns.enGloss: My train leaves at eight, so around half past seven?

replies.sk: V pohode, vyzdvihnem ťa o pol ôsmej.
replies.enGloss: No problem, I'll pick you up at half past seven.
Okay, I'll be in front of the house.

turns.sk: Si zlatý, fakt vďaka. Dlžím ti kávu.
turns.enGloss: You're a star, thanks a lot. I owe you a coffee.

replies.sk: Tak na tú kávu sa teším!
replies.enGloss: I'm looking forward to that coffee then!

turns.sk: Ešte raz vďaka. Tak zajtra ráno?
turns.enGloss: Thanks again. So tomorrow morning?

replies.enGloss: Yes, in the morning at half past seven.

replies.sk: Platí, daj vedieť, ak sa niečo zmení.
replies.enGloss: Deal, let me know if anything changes.

turns.sk: Super. Tak sa maj, dobrú noc!
turns.enGloss: Great. Take care then, good night!

replies.enGloss: Good night, see you in the morning!

scenarios.title: Meeting the family
scenarios.description: Meet your partner's family for the first time. Be polite and friendly.
scenarios.starterLineSk: Dobrý deň, teší ma. Konečne sa stretávame!

turns.sk: Dobrý deň, teší ma. Konečne sa stretávame!
turns.enGloss: Hello, nice to meet you. We finally meet!

replies.sk: Teší ma, veľa som o vás počul.
replies.enGloss: Nice to meet you, I've heard a lot about you.

turns.sk: Poďte ďalej, nech sa páči. Dáte si kávu alebo čaj?
turns.enGloss: Come in, please. Will you have coffee or tea?

replies.enGloss: Coffee, if I may. Thank you.

turns.sk: A čo robíte? Kde pracujete?
turns.enGloss: And what do you do? Where do you work?

replies.sk: Pracujem ako učiteľ na základnej škole.
replies.enGloss: I work as a teacher at an elementary school.
I work in IT, I program.

turns.sk: To je pekné povolanie. A odkiaľ pochádzate?
turns.enGloss: That's a nice profession. And where are you from?

replies.sk: Som z Košíc, ale bývam v Bratislave.
replies.enGloss: I'm from Košice, but I live in Bratislava.

replies.sk: Pochádzam z malej dediny pri Žiline.
replies.enGloss: I come from a small village near Žilina.

turns.sk: Krásne. Tak si sadnite, obed je takmer hotový.
turns.enGloss: Lovely. So sit down, lunch is almost ready.

replies.sk: Veľmi pekné, nemuseli ste sa toľko trápiť.
replies.enGloss: Very kind, you shouldn't have gone to such trouble.

turns.sk: Ale prosím vás, je to radosť. Dobrú chuť!
turns.enGloss: Oh please, it's a pleasure. Enjoy your meal!

replies.sk: Ďakujem pekne, dobrú chuť aj vám.
replies.enGloss: Thank you very much, enjoy your meal too.

scenarios.title: Group-chat reactions
scenarios.description: React in a lively group chat. Keep it short and casual.
scenarios.starterLineSk: Ľudia, idem dnes na grilovačku. Kto príde?

turns.sk: Ľudia, idem dnes na grilovačku. Kto príde?
turns.enGloss: Guys, I'm having a barbecue today. Who's coming?

turns.sk: Super! Začíname o piatej u mňa na záhrade.
turns.enGloss: Great! We start at five at my place in the garden.

turns.sk: Mäso mám, doneste hlavne chlast a dobrú náladu :D
turns.enGloss: I've got the meat, mainly bring booze and good vibes :D

replies.enGloss: Haha sure, the vibes will be there!

turns.sk: Niekto vie, či bude pršať? Pozeral som a vraj nie.
turns.enGloss: Does anyone know if it'll rain? I checked and apparently not.

replies.sk: Aj ja pozeral, malo by byť super počasie.
replies.enGloss: I checked too, the weather should be great.

turns.sk: Tak fajn, čakám vás. Kto vie, nech vezme aj reproák.
turns.enGloss: Alright, I'll be expecting you. Whoever can, bring a speaker too.

replies.enGloss: I have one at home, I'll drag it over.

turns.sk: Paráda, ste najlepší. Vidíme sa o piatej! 🔥
turns.enGloss: Awesome, you're the best. See you at five! 🔥

replies.enGloss: Looking forward to it, see you!
